The Full Story

Who is SinnaVT?

Hey hey! I'm Sinna, your bubbly Indigenous Canadian VTuber and chaotic variety streamer. I'm all about good vibes, great games, and building a community where everyone can hang out, laugh, and feel welcome.

You'll usually catch me playing FPS games like Valorant and Apex, but honestly? I'll jump into just about anything if it sounds fun. Streaming for me is more than just gaming - it's creating a space where people can relax, make friends, and enjoy the chaos together.

Whether we're sweating in ranked, getting absolutely destroyed by jump scares, or just vibing and chatting, there's never a dull moment around here. Expect lots of energy, dumb jokes, occasional gremlin behavior, and a community that feels like home.

🇨🇦 Indigenous Canadian 🎮 FPS + Variety 🌟 VTuber 18+ Community ✨ Cozy Chaos

Sinna's Emotes 🎨

When something is just chef kiss

Sipping tea and judging. You know the vibe
SinnaCry
For the emotional moments - happy or sad

Lurking in the shadows but still here

When Sinna gets flustered - very rare
SinnaSmug
